page_content:
Prerequisite: PSYC200.

Restriction: Permission of BSOS-Psychology department.

PSYC489 Advanced Special Topics in Psychology (3 Credits) Treatment of a specialized topic in psychology.

Prerequisite: PSYC300.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

PSYC498 Advanced Psychology II (Honors) (1 Credit) Seminar covering topics of current interest in psychology. Prerequisite: Permission of BSOS-Psychology department. Repeatable to: 3 credits.

PSYC499 Honors Thesis Research (3 Credits) Prerequisite: PSYC469; and must have permission of thesis advisor.
